CVE-2016-3099.title: mod_ns in Red Hat Enterprise Linux Desktop 7, Red Hat Enterprise  ...
CVE-2016-3099.description: mod_ns in Red Hat Enterprise Linux Desktop 7, Red Hat Enterprise Linux HPC Node 7, Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server 7, and Red Hat Enterprise Linux Workstation 7 allows remote attackers to force the use of ciphers that were not intended to be enabled.
